name: Raytracer — Interactive GPU (native WebGPU)
description: Continuously-progressive path tracer on the native GPU: each frame is one WGSL compute dispatch (accum.wgsl via lib/gpu.rae) accumulating into a persistent HDR buffer; moving the camera resets it. WASD/E/Q move, arrows or left-drag to look (Z-up). The GPU twin of example 43. Compiled-target only; needs wgpu-native + SDL3.
